title: Shared Medical Vocabulary Cardiovascular Core v1

items.label: pulmonary hypertension
items.ambiguity_notes: PH is a short abbreviation and should be interpreted only with pulmonary hypertension context.

items.label: heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
items.preferred_zh: 射血分数降低型心力衰竭
items.preferred_en: heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
items.ambiguity_notes: HFrEF should remain a heart failure subtype and not be expanded to all ejection fraction phenotypes.
expected_terms: heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
射血分数降低型心力衰竭

items.label: heart failure with preserved ejection fraction
items.preferred_zh: 射血分数保留型心力衰竭
items.preferred_en: heart failure with preserved ejection fraction
items.ambiguity_notes: HFpEF should remain a heart failure subtype and not be expanded to all ejection fraction phenotypes.
expected_terms: heart failure with preserved ejection fraction
射血分数保留型心力衰竭

items.label: atrial fibrillation
items.ambiguity_notes: AF is a short token and can be ambiguous outside cardiovascular context.

items.label: ventricular tachycardia
items.ambiguity_notes: VT is a short token and should require exact abbreviation matching.

items.label: ventricular fibrillation
items.ambiguity_notes: VF is a short token and should require exact abbreviation matching.

items.label: pulmonary embolism
items.ambiguity_notes: PE is a short abbreviation and should require exact match.

items.label: congenital heart disease
items.ambiguity_notes: CHD can also mean coronary heart disease; require context for expansion.

items.label: ejection fraction
items.ambiguity_notes: EF is a short token; exact abbreviation matching is required.

items.label: cardiac troponin I
items.ambiguity_notes: cTnI is a short biomarker abbreviation and should not imply disease by itself.

items.label: cardiac troponin T
items.ambiguity_notes: cTnT is a short biomarker abbreviation and should not imply disease by itself.

items.label: B-type natriuretic peptide
items.ambiguity_notes: BNP is a short biomarker abbreviation and should not imply heart failure by itself.

items.label: N-terminal pro-B-type natriuretic peptide
items.ambiguity_notes: NT-proBNP is a biomarker, not a disease concept.

items.label: C-reactive protein
items.ambiguity_notes: CRP is a short biomarker abbreviation and should not imply disease by itself.

items.label: LDL cholesterol
items.ambiguity_notes: LDL alone is a biomarker token and should not imply disease without high/low context.

items.label: HDL cholesterol
items.ambiguity_notes: HDL alone is a biomarker token and should not imply disease without high/low context.

items.label: triglycerides
items.ambiguity_notes: TG is a short biomarker abbreviation and should not imply hypertriglyceridemia by itself.

items.label: total cholesterol
items.ambiguity_notes: TC is a short biomarker abbreviation and should not imply disease by itself.

ambiguity_terms.notes: Can mean coronary artery disease or computer-aided design; exact cardiovascular context required.
Can mean coronary heart disease or congenital heart disease.
Can mean myocardial infarction; do not confuse with stroke.
Can mean pulmonary hypertension or pH; require context.
Can mean atrial fibrillation; exact abbreviation matching required.
Can mean ventricular tachycardia; exact abbreviation matching required.
Can mean ventricular fibrillation; exact abbreviation matching required.
Can mean pulmonary embolism or physical education; exact context required.
Biomarker token, not disease by itself.
Biomarker token, not disease by itself.
Inflammatory biomarker token, not disease by itself.
Heart failure biomarker token, not disease by itself.
Cardiac phenotype token, not an effect measure or disease.
